extracted.title: SESH Meter Underperformance
extracted.description:
Southeast Supply Header, LLC (SESH) system has limited ability to absorb due pipeline imbalances from receipt and/or delivery point operators. SESH requires the following meter operator to perform to scheduled quantities or confirmation restrictions will be made commensurate with anticipated physical deliveries:

Loc: 83012; Loc Name: GULF SOUTH PETAL GAS STORAGE (WD); County: Forrest; Loc St: MS

If immediate action is not taken by the meter operators by 2PM CCT, reductions for Gas Day January 26, 2026, may be required.

TE will continue to monitor performance at these meters for future gas days.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
